seoTitle: How to Auto Refresh a Page in Power BI Desktop
metaDescription: Set up automatic page refresh in Power BI Desktop for near real-time dashboards, using DirectQuery and canvas-level refresh interval settings.
intro: Manually clicking refresh all day isn't practical for dashboards tracking live metrics like IoT sensors, stock prices, or warehouse activity. Power BI's automatic page refresh feature updates your canvas on a set interval without user interaction, as long as your connection mode supports it. Here's how to enable it correctly.

steps.heading: Switch your connection to DirectQuery
steps.body: Automatic page refresh requires a DirectQuery or Microsoft Fabric Direct Lake connection mode rather than standard Import mode, so confirm your data source is configured this way first.

steps.heading: Open the page-level formatting options
steps.body: Select the specific report page you want to auto-refresh and open its formatting pane to find the refresh settings.

steps.heading: Set your refresh interval
steps.body: Choose a duration for how frequently the page should refresh, balancing responsiveness against the load placed on your underlying data source.

steps.heading: Manage query limits
steps.body: Be mindful of how resource-intensive your refresh queries are, since overly frequent refreshes on complex queries can strain your data source.

steps.heading: Publish your live dashboard
steps.body: Publish the report to the Power BI Service so the automatic refresh continues running for anyone viewing the shared dashboard.

faq.question: Does automatic page refresh work with Import mode?
faq.answer: No, it requires DirectQuery or Microsoft Fabric Direct Lake connection modes rather than standard Import mode.

faq.question: How short can I set the refresh interval?
faq.answer: Available minimum intervals depend on your license tier, with shorter intervals generally reserved for premium capacities.

faq.question: Will frequent refreshing slow down my data source?
faq.answer: It can, especially with complex queries, so it's worth managing your refresh frequency against your source system's capacity.

faq.question: Can I set different refresh rates for different pages?
faq.answer: Yes, automatic page refresh is configured at the individual page level, so different pages in the same report can have different intervals.
